101010111011110011111110100100001100100010001001010110000000 - ASI: 26

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  101 = 1 * 01
  110 = 11 * 0
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0011 = 00 * 11
  0100 = 01 * 00
  1010 = 101 * 0
  1111 = 11 * 11
  00110 = 00 * 110
  11000 = 110 * 00
  1010101 = 1010 * 101
  1101111 = 110 * 1111
  00111111 = 0011 * 1111
  01000100 = 0100 * 0100
  01001010 = 0100 * 1010
  10100100 = 1010 * 0100
  110000000 = 11000 * 0000
  0011001000100 = 00110 * 01000100
  10101011101111 = 1010101 * 1101111
  0011111110100100 = 00111111 * 10100100
  01001010110000000 = 01001010 * 110000000
  001100100010001001010110000000 = 0011001000100 * 01001010110000000
  101010111011110011111110100100 = 10101011101111 * 0011111110100100
  101010111011110011111110100100001100100010001001010110000000 = 101010111011110011111110100100 * 001100100010001001010110000000
